series_metadata.series_description: These files contain applications for a Money Transmitter license, change of control applications, security devices including letters of cancellation, written reports of specified events, and termination plans according to which a licensee ceases to conduct business in Ohio.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years licensee ceases conducting business in Ohio
